name: @anthropic/context-layer
description: Intelligent Context Layer for Claude Code - semantic file summaries, impact analysis, and context health monitoring
author: Auto-Claude

claude-plugin.name: context-layer
claude-plugin.description: Provides semantic file summaries, impact analysis, symbol context, and context health monitoring

tools.name: semantic_lookup
tools.description: Get file summaries before reading full content

tools.name: impact_check
tools.description: Check what breaks before modifying code

tools.name: symbol_context
tools.description: Get type info and documentation for any symbol
